project.name: vector-store-test-support
project.description: Shared test fixtures and loaders used by sibling modules' test code. Packaged as a regular jar (rather than a maven-jar-plugin test-jar) so the dependency graph stays explicit: consumers declare a normal dependency under the `test` scope. Today carries the Wikipedia + MiniLM-L6-v2 recall fixture (corpus.jsonl + queries.jsonl) and its record types; future fixtures live alongside.
